description_long: This is a pair of heavy-duty aviation snips, commonly used for cutting sheet metal and other tough materials in urban maintenance and construction settings. The tool features robust, slightly curved steel jaws with a compound leverage mechanism, allowing for increased cutting force. The handles are ergonomically shaped, coated in yellow and black rubberized material for enhanced grip and comfort during prolonged use. The metal surfaces show signs of wear and oxidation, indicating frequent use in demanding environments. The pivot joint is reinforced with visible bolts and washers, ensuring durability and smooth operation. No visible branding or logo is present on the tool.
description: A well-worn pair of aviation snips with curved steel jaws and yellow-black ergonomic rubber handles, designed for cutting tough materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the snips, with both jaws and ergonomic handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the jaws and the layered construction of the pivot mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with subtle differences in handle curvature and wear patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the profile of the jaws and the handle's rubber coating.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic, rubber-coated handles with yellow and black coloration for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_jaw_design: Short, broad, slightly curved steel jaws with a serrated cutting edge, designed for aviation snips to cut through sheet metal.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Compound leverage pivot with visible bolts and washers, providing increased cutting force and smooth operation.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized, ribbed texture on the handles for enhanced grip and tactile feedback.
